title: Unexpected execution result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(10), c3 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES(1, 'test', TRUE);
CREATE TABLE t2(c4 FLOAT, c5 DATE);
INSERT INTO t2(c4, c5) VALUES(3.14, DATE('2023-01-01'));
SELECT t1.c1 FROM t1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 WHERE (SELECT t1.c2 IS NULL) = FALSE);
key_bug_features: SELECT with NOT EXISTS and NULL comparison
